seed_problem: Place watchtowers on a forest graph to cover every cell within radius r, minimizing total cost.
mutation: composite: retheme watchtowers -> variable-reach fish ladders on a river tree, per-node cost tied to reach (facility-location trade-off), and cover only a demand subset (spawning grounds) rather than every cell -> weighted partial radius cover / min-cost dominating-set variant.
title: Salmon Migration Ladder Placement
strategies: trivial baseline: build one ladder at every spawning ground (always feasible)
cost-effectiveness greedy: repeatedly build the ladder maximizing newly-covered spawning grounds per unit cost
multi-start randomized greedy with redundancy pruning: diversify tie-breaking over restarts and drop ladders made redundant by later picks
LP-relaxation rounding / local-search swaps trading one high-reach hub for several small local ladders
